goal: Record which attached Sentinel-2 L2A COG tiles bbox-intersect the draft Pacuare planning bounds before implementing corridor-clipped raster-window reads or source-drape replacement.

method.source: sentinel_cog_thumbnail_review attached_thumbnails bbox_wgs84 and tileinfo metadata
method.calculation: Axis-aligned WGS84 bbox intersections against draft Pacuare planning bounds; useful for source planning only.
method.precision_limit: Does not clip tileGeometry polygons in EPSG:32616/EPSG:32617, does not reproject the Pacuare route, and does not compute pixel windows.

coverage_summary.preliminary_decision: Both 17PKM and 16PHR bbox-intersect the draft planning bounds; keep both in the future windowed COG extraction/stitch plan while exact CRS clipping decides final coverage.

windowed_read_decision.next_required_step: Implement a reviewed raster-window reader that clips each tile in its native UTM CRS, applies SCL/cloud QA, stitches the accepted corridor, and records Sentinel terms/attribution before any production derivative is generated.

forbidden_use: water, vegetation, canopy, wet-rock, waterfall, mist, or cloud-shadow mask authority
claiming complete Pacuare corridor imagery coverage
promotion_blockers: Clip tileGeometry in EPSG:32616 and EPSG:32617 against a reviewed Pacuare corridor geometry rather than bbox estimates.
Compute exact COG pixel windows, read only the needed raster windows, and stitch in the selected working CRS.
Apply SCL/cloud/shadow/haze QA plus manual river/canopy/wet-rock/waterfall/mist review before generating masks or source drapes.
Record Sentinel terms, attribution, storage/LFS policy, and package redistribution review before committing derived production rasters.
